author: Sonia
name: 7L MLP3x 4k Seq LR-Tuned
blurb: 7-layer 512d transformer with 3x MLP width, 4096 sequence length, tuned LRs (tied_embed_lr=0.01, matrix_lr=0.03), logit_softcap=15, qk_gain_init=1.0, warmdown_iters=3000, extra RMSNorm before projections. Wider MLP + longer context + lower LRs give smoother weight distributions that quantize well (quant gap ~0.001).
